subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto those who attained unto true knowledge when the All-Merciful appeared and held fast unto His mighty cord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للذین فازوا بالعرفان اذ اتی الرحمن و تمسکوا بحبله المتین انا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God
